acceptance_criteria: Inbound Move from actor A to actor B: verify B.alsoKnownAs includes A's URI; for each local follower of A, create follow to B and enqueue Follow activity; A's followers removed; B's followers updated; migration without valid alsoKnownAs is rejected
description: Implement alsoKnownAs for migration support. Store alsoKnownAs URIs per local account in also_known_as table. Handle inbound Move activities: verify new actor has alsoKnownAs pointing to old actor, migrate follower relationships (create follows to new actor for each local account that followed old actor, send Follow activities), update remote_accounts to reflect the move.
design: Also_known_as table: account_id + uri. Verify Move: fetch new actor document, check alsoKnownAs field includes old actor URI. Migrate: INSERT INTO follows (follower_id, followee_remote_id) for new actor; DELETE FROM follows where followee was old actor. Enqueue Follow activities for each migrated follow.
title: alsoKnownAs storage and inbound Move handling
